{{Shell
|name=Fairy's Whisper
|image=Fairy's Whisper.png
|description=Snail Shell was owned by the Spirit Sage, whose dimension was invaded by a new technology that destroyed its castle and cut off the halls of magic. The fairies lost their home, and could not but perform on the streets singing: "The snow glows white on the street tonight..."
|affct=FTH
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=7098
|relic1=Izu Dancer
|relic2=Cornucopia
|relic3=Sunflowers
|relic4=Leaf of Yggdrasil
|relic5=Tree of Life
}}
|color=green
|earth=4
|water=1
|fire=0
|wind=1
|form=Angel
|element=Earth
|realm=Hellas
|orangehard=ATK
}}
